title: Verify self-contained offline operation
preconditions: Network access is denied and no Tally process is running before each workflow.
steps: Invoke every CLASSIFY acceptance workflow directly and through the compatible AI Agent Host; detect prompts, network attempts, and remaining processes.
expected: NFR-CLASSIFY-SELF-CONTAINED-LOCAL-OPERATION reaches complete offline non-interactive coverage with no required or leftover daemon, watcher, scheduler, or background worker.
